utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with explicit costs and aggregate monthly cost; satisfies requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with a monthly cost and coverage details; satisfies requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with a monthly cost and coverage details; satisfies requirement. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with a monthly cost and coverage limits; satisfies requirement. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown; satisfies requirement. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We must match each item from the final coverage plan to the closest-named option in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Physical Health and LifeFirst Mental Health (both map to primary_health_coverage -> physical_health/mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), HomeFirst Property Insurance (maps to property_protection -> home_content -> HomeFirst Standard Coverage), LifeFirst Travel Insurance (maps to mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), and VitalPlus Equipment Protection (no direct match in ground-truth; the closest category is property_enhancement_services -> Technology Protection, but names differ and this is not the same product. Since there is no exact item name in the ratings for 'VitalPlus Equipment Protection', it should be omitted from RATINGS to maintain exact-name mapping).
